offer: For property managers processing 10-20 tenant requests/month, inefficient coordination causes tenant dissatisfaction. We provide a maintenance scheduling bot instead of manual scheduling via email or phone calls.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try manual request input and simple reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedule presets for users
Allow CSV import for existing maintenance data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding to reduce user steps
